partial_fix_scope: reversed the 5 non-facts.py defects (lender_match, required_docs, recommendation, cre_fields); the 4 facts.py defects (distance + interaction pair + liquidity guard) left planted

leak_checks.note: Single 'import codebase' commit contains the already-planted source as the initial import; git diff is empty and there is no base->planted delta in history, log -p, stash, or reflog. The seven gold test files are not in the committed tree; they enter only via the verifier test_patch at grade time.

visible_suite_note: Full tests/ suite: 7 pre-existing env-gated failures on the CLEAN base (test_inbound_calls x3, test_document_ingestion_readiness x2, test_document_report x1, test_ingestion_stale_recovery x1) — all unrelated to CRE qualification. Planted + 7 gold files removed yields the IDENTICAL 7 failures (0 new failures introduced by the defects). The nine CRE/qualification test files that remain visible to the agent are green at the planted state.
fairness_audit: Gold tests are the repository's own CRE tests, restored verbatim; they assert observable values/names (budget total, liquid figure, matched product name, recommendation band, normalized doc type, extracted amount) using SimpleNamespace / LoanProductCriteria typed fakes with explicit attribute values, never a bare MagicMock patched at a consumer module, so a near-correct fix cannot crash on a mock. No f2p assertion depends on task env (none is set). Alternative-implementation audit passes: each assertion pins a value or a name, not the oracle's control flow, so a materially different correct implementation still passes.
notes: Hardened forge task. Nine natural, type-preserving logic slips across the CRE qualification flow (4 modules + 1 upstream extractor) flip 12 existing tests, restored only via test_patch. Includes one interacting defect pair on the construction-budget path (fixing one alone changes the failure mode, not clears it) and one distance defect whose sole symptom is an engine liquidity verdict 2 call-hops downstream. solve.sh reverse-applies the source defect patch. Full ladder verified in docker; sonnet/opus probes NOT run per instructions.
